subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to follow up after the conference! We'd love to get something on the calendar — a 30-minute call next week works well for us. Please send over a couple of time slots that suit you and we'll confirm one.

On your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share internal personnel contact information with external parties directly. That said, once we've had our initial call and there's a clear path forward, we'd be glad to facilitate the right senior-level introductions through proper channels.

Looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
Agent, on behalf of the team
